---
title: "Session Notes"
description: "Reading guides, discussion questions, and framing notes for each session."
listing:
  contents: "week*.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "order"
  fields: [title, description]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Session"
    description: "Topic"
---

<div style="padding-block: var(--sp-lg); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--ink-mid); max-width: 600px;">
Each note summarises the key concepts for the week, frames the readings, and includes discussion questions. They are meant to be read alongside — not instead of — the assigned texts.
</div>
